title: SuicideCommand
description: A lightweight mod that adds command: /suicide
body:
# ⚠️ ARCHIVED & DEPRECATED

> This is a very early project. The technology used here is outdated, and the mod is no longer maintained. It has been completely replaced by my new project: **[PPE Essentials - Minecraft Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/ppe-essentials)**. Please use the new mod instead.

# 📕 Overview

- A lightweight mod that adds command: **/suicide**

- When players get stuck, lost, fall into a weird hole, or are simply too lazy to walk back, they can just type this command to end themselves and return to their respawn point (with a unique death message).

# ✨ Features

- No extra dependencies — extremely lightweight with zero performance impact

- Does not modify any gameplay content

- Server-side only (Can still be installed on your client for singleplayer use.)
